abilities.name: 틀깨기
abilities.description: 특성에 관계없이 상대에게 기술을 쓸 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.
This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.
